ns0:entry.ns0:title: 1Panel-dev/CordysCRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/1Panel-dev/CordysCRM
Language: java
🔥 Cordys 是由飞致云匠心打造的新一代的开源 AI CRM 系统，深度融合信息化、数字化与智能化能力，支持私有化部署，全面保障企业数据安全与主权。

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT
Language: java
A flaming wreck of a minecraft mod about nuclear technology that is somehow still in development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
🚀 Real-world DevOps projects for aspiring engineers — Beginner to Advanced. Covers AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, and more. Hands-on learning with step-by-step guides.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bethington/ghidra-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bethington/ghidra-mcp
Language: java
Ghidra MCP Server — 200+ MCP tools for AI-powered reverse engineering. GUI plugin + headless server, lazy tool loading, convention enforcement, batch operations, Ghidra Server integration, and Docker deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dataease/dataease
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dataease/dataease
Language: java
🔥 人人可用的开源 BI 工具，数据可视化神器。An open-source BI tool alternative to Tableau.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dromara/Sa-Token
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dromara/Sa-Token
Language: java
✨ 开源、免费、一站式 Java 权限认证框架，让鉴权变得简单、优雅！—— 登录认证、权限认证、分布式 Session 会话、微服务网关鉴权、SSO 单点登录、OAuth2.0 统一认证、jwt 集成、API Key 秘钥授权、API 参数签名

URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
